Call ID: EXT-024
Type: external
Date: 2026-05-02
Topic: Quarterly Business Review
Participants: Sofia (account manager); Yuki (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Sofia): Hi Yuki, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Yuki): We want to align on goals and success metrics for next quarter.
AM (Sofia): Here's how your outcomes compare to similar teams in your industry.
Customer (Yuki): Numbers matter to us — show me the impact.
AM (Sofia): Let's set two or three concrete goals we can track together.
Customer (Yuki): Love it. Let's get the paperwork moving.
AM (Sofia): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
